name: Heath Bar Cake (Plain Jane)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix flour and sugars in a large bowl until well combined.
3. Cut in butter until the mixture is as fine as cornmeal. Set aside half of the mixture for topping.
4. Coarsely chop 7 Heath Bars. Add them to the remaining flour mixture, along with 1 cup chopped nuts and chocolate chips.
5. Add baking soda to buttermilk and stir into the mixture. Stir in egg and vanilla.
6. Pour the batter into a prepared, greased, and floured 9-inch x 13-inch pan.
7. Coarsely chop the remaining 2 Heath Bars. Add them to the reserved crumb mixture along with the remaining chopped nuts.
8. Sprinkle the chopped Heath Bars over the batter.
9. Bake at 350°F for 35 minutes. Cool before serving.
